page: Microsoft Azure M176bds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 176 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 88 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor operating at 4.0 GHz. The hardware configuration includes 3892.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 22.11 GB of RAM per core. For local storage, the instance is bundled with 8192 GB of local disk capacity and is premium storage capable. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple compute and memory metrics. The server achieves top-tier status in stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, PassMark CPU scores, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. Memory bandwidth is exceptionally strong, reaching top-tier performance in both small-block cached reads and large-block uncached read/write operations. Database operations and Redis SET operations also rank in the top tier, alongside static web serving throughput. For AI workloads, the processor's Advanced Matrix Extensions and AVX-512 capabilities support top-tier prompt processing speeds for large 70B LLM models.

Given its massive memory footprint of nearly 4 TB and high-density 176-vCPU compute profile, this server offers high resource density for enterprise-scale workloads. The qualitative cost efficiency is aligned with its heavy-duty hardware class, trading lower-tier budget efficiency for maximum memory capacity and high-throughput processing. It is highly suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, high-throughput static web serving, and memory-intensive enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure M176bds_4_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by 176 dedicated vCPUs on an Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz. It features 3892.0 GB of RAM and 8192 GB of local storage, with no GPU accelerators. Benchmarks show top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations, alongside strong performance in large-model LLM inference. The server's high memory-to-vCPU ratio and massive local storage capacity make it highly efficient for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. It is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, Redis deployments, heavy data processing, and high-throughput web serving.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity, dedicated Intel Xeon processors, and high-speed local storage for enterprise workloads.

3892 GB of system memory for massive in-memory workloads
8192 GB of local storage with premium storage capabilities
